series_metadata.series_description: Records contains employment history, payroll earnings, and deduction information. May contain Personnel Action, Withholding Certificates, Payroll Deduction, Deferred Compensation, Health Care, Dental and Vision Care, Request for Leave, Address Change, Payroll Record and W-2 records.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 5 years in records center then destroy provided audits are completed, reports are released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: Retain 5 years in records center then destroy provided audits are completed, reports are released and all discrepancies are resolved, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
